results.title: Sindh govt to install big screens for Fifa WC semis, final in Karachi, other cities
results.description: Fans watch Fifa World Cup 2026 match at stadium in Karachi's Lyari. — X The Sindh govt’s Department of Sports and Youth Affairs has decided to show the semi-final and final matches of the Football World Cup on big screens for fans. The semi-final lineup at World Cup 2026...

results.title: PHOTOS: 2026 Johnnycake Jog (divisional and overall headshots), July 12, 2026
results.description: Brian Fisher’s photos from divisional winners and overall top three from the Johnnycake Jog on July 12, 2026. Note: Some headshots were not available.

results.title: Padres ride unconventional offensive effort into finale vs. Jays
results.description: Given the way the Toronto Blue Jays and San Diego Padres have struggled to score this year, an 8-7 game at any point in the teams' weekend series probably wasn't on many Bingo cards.

results.title: Pollock, pace and potential offer glimpse of promised land for England
results.description: If Steve Borthwick is to emulate Thomas Tuchel he must fully embrace the attacking talent which tore Fiji apart

results.title: Ruben Amorim lays foundations for Noussair Mazraoui move
results.description: Ruben Amorim and Noussair Mazraoui are two names that have been closely related to Manchester United in recent times. Amorim, who found great success at Sporting CP before coming to Old Trafford, attempted to bring success back to the club but was unsuccessful, leaving the club in January.

results.title: England seal 4-0 series wweep with 56-run victory over India in fifth T20I
results.description: Powered by Jos Buttler's marauding hundred, England defeated India by 56 runs in the fifth and final T20I to sweep the five-match series 4-0 here on Saturday.
